parameters.content:
### Receive Inbound Webhook

Entry point: listens for POST calls on `/wf06693-document`. Use the TEST url while building, switch callers to the PRODUCTION url after publishing.

Next: Required Fields Present?

### Required Fields Present?

Two-way gate on `={{ $json.title }}`. TRUE continues the happy path, FALSE takes the alternate branch.

Ports: тСатЖТ Detect Sentiment ┬╖ тСбтЖТ Abort тАФ Malformed Input

### Abort тАФ Malformed Input

Fails fast with a clear message; triggers the error workflow instead of processing bad data.

### Detect Sentiment

Scores the text's sentiment; ports fire positive / neutral / negative.

Ports: тСатЖТ Escalate Negative тАФ Slack ┬╖ тСбтЖТ Log Neutral Feedback, Capture Failure Context ┬╖ тСвтЖТ Thank the Sender

тЪа failures exit via the error rail

### OpenRouter Chat Model

Chat model powering the AI step (model: `anthropic/claude-sonnet-4.5`). Swap providers here without rewiring.

Feeds **Detect Sentiment** as `languageModel`

ЁЯФС OpenRouter API key

### Escalate Negative тАФ Slack

Posts a message to Slack (`#knowledge`) тАФ a low-latency way for the team to see automation activity without checking a dashboard.

Ports: тСатЖТ Collect All Outcomes ┬╖ тСбтЖТ Capture Failure Context

тЖ╗ retries 3├Ч/2s ┬╖ тЪа failures exit via the error rail ┬╖ ЁЯФС Slack OAuth2

### Log Neutral Feedback

Appends a new row to 'Document Tracker' тАФ a human-readable audit trail that doesn't require opening n8n to inspect.

Ports: тСатЖТ Collect All Outcomes ┬╖ тСбтЖТ Capture Failure Context

тЖ╗ retries 3├Ч/2s ┬╖ тЪа failures exit via the error rail ┬╖ ЁЯФС Google OAuth2 / service account

### Thank the Sender

Posts a message to Slack тАФ a low-latency way for the team to see automation activity without checking a dashboard.

Ports: тСатЖТ Collect All Outcomes ┬╖ тСбтЖТ Capture Failure Context

тЖ╗ retries 3├Ч/2s ┬╖ тЪа failures exit via the error rail ┬╖ ЁЯФС Slack OAuth2

### Collect All Outcomes

Rejoins 3 branches into one stream (mode: append) so downstream logic runs once.

Next: Tag Pipeline Metadata

### Tag Pipeline Metadata

Shapes the item: writes `pipeline`, `version`. Keeps the schema explicit between stages.

Next: Cap Batch Volume

### Cap Batch Volume

Caps the stream at 100 items to protect downstream quotas.

Next: Stamp Processing Time

### Stamp Processing Time

Stamps `processedAt` with the current time for auditing.

Next: Summarize Run Stats

### Summarize Run Stats

Shapes the item: writes `runAt`, `itemCount`, `status`. Keeps the schema explicit between stages.

Next: Append Audit Row (Google Sheets)

### Append Audit Row (Google Sheets)

Appends a new row to 'Document Tracker' тАФ a human-readable audit trail that doesn't require opening n8n to inspect.

Ports: тСатЖТ Send Summary to Slack ┬╖ тСбтЖТ Capture Failure Context

тЖ╗ retries 3├Ч/2s ┬╖ тЪа failures exit via the error rail ┬╖ ЁЯФС Google OAuth2 / service account

### Send Summary to Slack

Posts a message to Slack (`#knowledge`) тАФ a low-latency way for the team to see automation activity without checking a dashboard.

тЖ╗ retries 3├Ч/2s ┬╖ тЪа failures exit via the error rail ┬╖ ЁЯФС Slack OAuth2

### Capture Failure Context

Shapes the item: writes `failedNode`, `errorMessage`, `workflow`. Keeps the schema explicit between stages.

Next: Escalate Failure to Twilio

### Escalate Failure to Twilio

Sends an SMS via Twilio тАФ reserved for urgent alerts since SMS costs money per message, unlike chat notifications.

тЖ╗ retries 3├Ч/2s ┬╖ ЁЯФС Twilio SID + token

# Distill meeting notes with Google Sheets and Twilio hands-free

**Pattern:** AI Summarize & Route ┬╖ **Level:** Advanced ┬╖ **Trigger:** Webhook

## What it does
Distill meeting notes with Google Sheets and Twilio hands-free. It fires the moment an external system calls its webhook.

## Why it exists
Manual knowledge sync is slow and error-prone; this workflow makes the process repeatable, monitored and hands-off, with failures surfaced instead of silently lost.

## Main flow
Receive Inbound Webhook тЖТ Required Fields Present? тЖТ Detect Sentiment тЖТ Escalate Negative тАФ Slack тЖТ Collect All Outcomes тЖТ Tag Pipeline Metadata тЖТ Cap Batch Volume тЖТ тАж

## Use it for
- Teams that want to ai summarize & route without manual effort
- Anyone automating knowledge sync in ai
- Replacing a fragile manual process with a reliable workflow

## You get
- Keeps your systems in sync
- Scales without extra headcount
- Responds in seconds

## Before first run
Connect credentials: Google OAuth2 / service account; OpenRouter API key; Slack OAuth2; Twilio SID + token.
Follow the color key: ЁЯЯж entry ┬╖ ЁЯЯк AI ┬╖ ЁЯЯл actions ┬╖ тмЬ utilities ┬╖ ЁЯЯй outputs ┬╖ ЁЯЯе error rail.
Each node has its own doc card underneath тАФ read those before editing.

## Try it now
Sample data is pinned on the trigger тАФ hit **Execute Workflow** to watch it flow through every node before connecting any real credentials. Unpin the trigger (right-click тЖТ Unpin) when you're ready to go live.

## Design decisions

A three-way branch on sentiment, not a single IF, because 'neutral' deserves different handling than 'negative' тАФ quietly logging positive feedback while paging a human only for genuine complaints keeps the alert channel's signal-to-noise ratio high for whoever is on the other end.

## Practice exercises

You've got the basics covered тАФ push further:

1. Add a logging step to the neutral branch too and compare its volume against the negative branch.
2. Test borderline phrases through the sentiment node to see where the positive/neutral line actually falls.
3. Add a 4th branch for a specific emotion if your sentiment provider supports finer-grained labels.

## ЁЯЫЯ Error handling & retries

External calls retry **3├Ч with 2s backoff**. Anything still failing exits through its node's error output into the red error rail тЖТ context is captured and the on-call channel is alerted. Set an n8n **Error Workflow** in settings as the final safety net.

## ЁЯФР Security

Never trust inbound payloads: the webhook path is unguessable. Add header auth or IP allow-listing for defense in depth. Secrets live in n8n credentials тАФ never in node parameters.

## ЁЯдЦ AI cluster

Purple nodes form one AI unit: the root node orchestrates, sub-nodes plug in via typed ports (model / memory / tools / parser). Swap the chat model without rewiring anything else. Costs scale with tokens тАФ keep prompts lean and cap iterations.

## ЁЯЫа Customize me

Quick wins: point the data nodes at your own accounts (see ЁЯФС lines on each card), adjust the trigger cadence, and tune thresholds/labels to your knowledge sync process. Every node card explains its role тАФ safe to extend at any marked branch.
